name: Agumon -Yuki no Kizuna-

signature_move.name: RedReamer
signature_move.description: Burns the enemy with high-intensity red lasers emitted from the tips of its claws.

description: The strong bond between Agumon and its Partner, it is a legendary, final evolution that was achieved after countless possibilities. The indomitable " Courage " of its Partner turned into hot flames that spurt out from its whole body, and appears as proof of their deep trust. It has a deeper understanding of humans owing to the long amount of time they spent together, and so this evolved form has also taken on a near-humanoid shape. Its Special Moves are burning the enemy with high-intensity red lasers emitted from the tips of its claws ( Red Reamer ), using the spear on its tail as a weapon and skewering them with it ( Strash Salamander ), and converting the flames of courage contained within it into an ultra-high temperature energy shot and then releasing it ( Gaia Brave ).
